timeline.label: Q1 2026 revenue HK$8.2B (+20% YoY); FY2025 EPS HK$14.05 and DPS HK$12.52 per IR headline
FY2024 record: revenue HK$22.4B (+9%), profit HK$13.1B, ADT HK$131.8B (+26% YoY), EBITDA margin 74%
FY2023 margin-fund and investment income elevated; unlisted equity marks volatile vs FY2024
HKEX completes acquisition of London Metal Exchange (LME)
Stock Connect launches linking Hong Kong with Shanghai (Shenzhen link follows 2016)
Demutualization and listing of HKEX on its own exchange

industry.structure: HKEX operates a near-monopoly on Hong Kong cash equities, derivatives, clearing, and listing infrastructure with LME commodities exposure. Fee pools scale with turnover, listings, and collateral balances; core operations carry limited balance-sheet principal risk.
industry.share_shift: FY2024–FY2025 benefited from strong China-linked flow and derivatives activity; mainland exchange competition and geopolitical risk remain structural overhangs versus global peers ICE and JPX.
industry.trend: Connect programs and data monetization are structural; margin-fund pass-through income is rate- and volume-sensitive. Q1 2026 run-rate still strong but base owner cash normalizes below peak EPS.
